scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build packages/audio --target web --out-dir pkg && cp packages/audio/pkg/repulse_audio_bg.wasm app/public/repulse_audio_bg.wasm && cp packages/audio/pkg/repulse_audio.js app/public/repulse_audio.js
scripts.dev:full: npm run build:wasm && npx shadow-cljs watch app
scripts.test: npx shadow-cljs compile test && node out/test.js
